briefdescription.para: The frequency of the crystal connected to the XA/XB pins of the Si5324 in Hz.

detaileddescription.para: Set to TRUE to enable debug prints, to FALSE to disable debug prints.

briefdescription.para: The following constants are error codes generated by the functions in this driver.
The following constants define the clock input select values.
The following constants define the limits of the Si5324 frequencies.
The following constants define the limits of the divider settings.

detaileddescription.para: Minimum N1_HS setting (4 and 5 are for higher output frequencies than we support

briefdescription.para: Minimum NCn_LS setting (1 and even values)
Maximum NCn_LS setting (1 and even values)
Initialize the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator.

detaileddescription.para: After initialization, the clock generator is not generating a clock yet. Call si5324_set_clock to start the clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 ClkInFreq, u32 ClkOutFreq, u8 *N1_hs, u32 *NCn_ls, u8 *N2_hs, u32 *N2_ls, u32 *N3n, u8 *BwSel)
memberdef.name: Si5324_CalcFreqSettings

briefdescription.para: Calculate the frequency settings for the desired output frequency.

parameterdescription.para: contains the frequency of the input clock.
contains the desired output clock frequency.
will be set to the value for the N1_HS register.
will be set to the value for the NCn_LS register.
will be set to the value for the N2_HS register.
will be set to the value for the N2_LS register.
will be set to the value for the N3n register.
will be set to the value for the BW_SEL register.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 IICBaseAddress, u8 IICAddress, u8 ClkSrc, u32 ClkInFreq, u32 ClkOutFreq)
memberdef.name: Si5324_SetClock

detaileddescription.para:
IICBaseAddress
contains the base address of the IIC master device.
IICAddress
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.
ClkSrc
selects the clock input to use.
ClkInFreq
contains the frequency of the input clock.
ClkOutFreq
contains the desired output clock frequency
SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated. Set the output frequency.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.
selects the clock input to use.
contains the frequency of the input clock (2kHz-710MHz).
contains the desired output clock frequency (2kHz-945MHz).

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated, SI5324_ERR_PARM when the ClkSrc or ClkDest parameters are invalid or the ClkInFreq or ClkOutFreq are out of range.

briefdescription.para: Reset the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure.

briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions for low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the KC705 demo board.

detaileddescription.para: The user should refer to the hardware device specification for more details of the device operation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 hf 2014/10/10 First release 1.1 gm 2017/06/23 Added Si5324_Reset in API declaration yh 2017/07/19 Added SI5324 control using PS IIC
